description.overview: Not to be confused with the Cavalier, the English Toy Spaniel (King Charles Spaniel in the UK) is smaller with a domed head. They're gentle, devoted lapdogs.
description.history: The English Toy Spaniel originated in England.
description.temperament: Known for being gentle, happy, playful.
description.grooming: Requires regular grooming appropriate for their long, silky, wavy coat.
description.exercise: Exercise needs match their energy level.

verdict.summary: Not to be confused with the Cavalier, the English Toy Spaniel (King Charles Spaniel in the UK) is smaller with a domed head. They're gentle, devoted lapdogs.
